rules.name: no-inline-component-prop
rules.summary: register the orphaned rule in the plugin (#1233)

rules.name: no-unnecessary-verb-suffix
rules.summary: make autofix reference-safe (closes #1256)

rules.name: no-explicit-return-type
rules.summary: exempt read-only widening return types from removal (closes #1253)

rules.name: no-hungarian
rules.summary: treat Fn/Func/Function as function-role designators, not type tags (closes #1255)

rules.name: no-type-assertion-returns
rules.summary: allow type assertions as call/new arguments in return position (closes #1254)

rules.name: no-unnecessary-verb-suffix
rules.summary: stop flagging Async/Sync execution-model suffixes (closes #1252)

rules.name: no-hungarian
rules.summary: exempt middle-segment full-type-words from Hungarian detection (closes #1250)

rules.name: react-memoize-literals
rules.summary: exempt hook returns containing JSX-valued members (closes #1251)

rules.name: enforce-boolean-naming-prefixes
rules.summary: require boolean prefix at a name boundary in callExpressionLooksBoolean (closes #1249)

rules.name: enforce-cloud-function-id-length
rules.summary: flag .f.ts paths deriving Firebase IDs over 62 chars (closes #1222)

rules.name: enforce-is-prefix-validators
rules.summary: require is-prefix on exported validators (closes #1193)

rules.name: enforce-m3-sentence-case
rules.summary: warn on Title Case / ALL CAPS user-facing text (closes #1190)

rules.name: enforce-snapshot-state-narrowing
rules.summary: require isSnapshotReady over falsy/typeof checks (closes #1210)

rules.name: enforce-types-directory-placement
rules.summary: flag type-only files outside functions/src/types (closes #1194)

rules.name: no-direct-function-state
rules.summary: flag functions passed directly to useState setters (closes #1208)

rules.name: no-fill-template-mutation
rules.summary: forbid mutating fillTemplate() results (closes #1209)

rules.name: no-portal-inside-tooltip
rules.summary: flag portals nested in tooltip wrappers (closes #1223)

rules.name: no-redundant-boolean-callback-props
rules.summary: flag boolean props redundant with a callback's presence (closes #1192)

rules.name: no-satisfies-in-frontend-bundle
rules.summary: ban satisfies in webpack-bundled files (closes #1226)

rules.name: no-single-dismiss-dialog-button
rules.summary: flag lone dismiss button in dialog buttons array (closes #1221)

rules.name: no-stablehash-react-nodes
rules.summary: flag stableHash() on ReactNodes/KeyedNodes (closes #1134)

rules.name: parallelize-loop-awaits
rules.summary: flag sequential await in loops parallelizable via Promise.all (closes #1184)

rules.name: prefer-flat-transform-each-keys
rules.summary: flag nested objects in propagation transformEach returns (closes #1212)

rules.name: prefer-getter-over-parameterless-method
rules.summary: exempt throwing and builder/factory methods (closes #1248)

rules.name: prefer-spread-over-reassembly
rules.summary: flag destructure-then-reassemble prop forwarding (closes #1188)

rules.name: prefer-sx-prop-over-system-props
rules.summary: migrate deprecated MUI system props into sx (closes #1189)

rules.name: prefer-use-base62-id
rules.summary: prefer useBase62Id() over useState/useRef/useMemo + uuidv4Base62() (closes #1206)

rules.name: prefer-use-theme
rules.summary: flag direct theme-constant imports over useTheme() (closes #1213)

rules.name: prefer-utility-function-own-file
rules.summary: flag sizable co-located utility functions (closes #1234)

rules.name: require-props-composition
rules.summary: flag component Props that don't compose with rendered children (closes #1181)

rules.name: require-server-timestamp-for-firestore-dates
rules.summary: flag new Date() in Firestore-typed objects (closes #1183)

rules.name: logical-top-to-bottom-grouping
rules.summary: restore loop-mutation guard and indentation-preserving idempotent autofix (closes #1247)

rules.name: no-hungarian
rules.summary: only flag abbreviation markers at camelCase token boundaries (closes #1246)

rules.name: enforce-assert-safe-object-key
rules.summary: treat assertSafe-cached variables as validated (closes #1245)

rules.name: enforce-dynamic-imports
rules.summary: restore libraries whitelist mode and exempt builtins/internal paths (closes #1244)

rules.name: require-memo
rules.summary: exempt camelCase render-prop callbacks (closes #1243)

rules.name: consistent-callback-naming
rules.summary: skip union props with non-function members (closes #1182)

rules.name: enforce-boolean-naming-prefixes
rules.summary: make property-signature checks opt-in (closes #1219)

rules.name: enforce-mui-rounded-icons
rules.summary: strip variant suffix in fix and skip brand icons (closes #1218)

rules.name: enforce-verb-noun-naming
rules.summary: add 'bucket'/'bucketize' to verbs allowlist (closes #1225); allow `main` as a function name (closes #1177)

rules.name: global-const-style
rules.summary: stop flagging null and boolean literals for `as const` (closes #1186)

rules.name: logical-top-to-bottom-grouping
rules.summary: keep sibling destructures from the same source declarator grouped (closes #1191)

rules.name: memo-compare-deeply-complex-props
rules.summary: skip reserved React ref/key slots (closes #1224); exclude React render types from complex-prop detection

rules.name: memo-nested-react-components
rules.summary: skip HOC factories and render-prop callbacks (closes #1185)

rules.name: no-array-length-in-deps
rules.summary: allow array.length in deps when the body uses only .length (closes #1196)

rules.name: no-circular-references
rules.summary: fix recursive member resolution and use cross-version scope helper; fix false positive for function parameters

rules.name: no-compositing-layer-props
rules.summary: don't flag CSS reset/identity values (closes #1228)

rules.name: no-entire-object-hook-deps
rules.summary: lock in shorthand/JSX usage detection for as-const memo returns (closes #1176); correctly handle TS assertions and optional chaining in parent traversal; resolve PR review comments on TS assertion handling in object literals

rules.name: no-explicit-return-type
rules.summary: exempt explicit `never` return types (closes #1216)

rules.name: no-hungarian
rules.summary: exempt generic type parameters and semantic type-concept names (closes #1217)

rules.name: no-margin-properties
rules.summary: don't flag margins inside createTheme() overrides (closes #1214)

rules.name: no-unnecessary-verb-suffix
rules.summary: exempt phrasal-verb particle endings (closes #1227)

rules.name: no-unused-props
rules.summary: track props through generic wrappers and body destructuring (closes #1215)

rules.name: no-useless-fragment
rules.summary: keep fragments wrapping a single expression container (closes #1195)

rules.name: react-memoize-literals
rules.summary: extend sx/style exemption to conditional, logical, and array values (refs #1169); exempt inline sx/style JSX attribute literals (closes #1169)

rules.name: require-migration-script-metadata
rules.summary: fix @migrationDependencies logic and update filename access for ESLint v9 compatibility; address review comments on JSDoc tag parsing and validation
